title: Economic Crime Plan 2: outcomes progress report
body: "The Economic Crime Plan 2 (ECP2) set out how public and private sectors would cut economic crime, protect national security, and support the UK’s legitimate economic growth. It placed focus on achieving tangible outcomes and measuring progress and performance across the system.  Within ECP2, the Home Office committed to developing an outcomes framework. This report provides a summary of key insights from the priority outcomes and indicators being monitored as part of the ECP2 outcomes framework. Indicators presented demonstrate where available data enables us to identify progress and/or strategic insights. Whilst individual data points show there are some positive indications of how the system is performing, it’s currently difficult to assess overall progress towards ECP2 outcomes. The report sets out where progress has been made in developing new data to address limitations and improve our ability to comprehensively measure performance. "
